g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is speed anomaly detection done in DevTrails?')
sendPrompt('What is location jump detection in DevTrails fraud checks?')
sendPrompt('How does mock GPS detection work in DevTrails?')
sendPrompt('What movement thresholds must a rider meet for eligibility?')
sendPrompt('What is the minimum session duration for insurance eligibility?')
sendPrompt('How is zone presence verified for a disruption claim?')
sendPrompt('How does DevTrails prevent duplicate payout claims?')
sendPrompt('What policy validation checks run before a claim?')

sendPrompt('What happens when a rider is flagged as high fraud risk?')
sendPrompt('What happens when all fraud checks pass?')
